product_updates.title: Get ready for the whisper-filled office of the future
product_updates.content: How will work setups change if we spend more and more time talking to our computers?

product_updates.title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
product_updates.content: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

product_updates.title: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic
product_updates.content: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we discussed what xAI's deal with Anthropic might mean for parent company SpaceX.

product_updates.title: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
product_updates.content: Wispr Flow says growth accelerated in India after its Hinglish rollout, even as voice AI products continue to face challenges.
